subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath recorded all things in a Book wherein were inscribed by the Most Exalted Pen the manifestations of His power [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی احصی کلشیء کتابا و فیه رقم من القلم الاعلی ظهورات قدرته و
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
